name: china-economic-quarterly-skills
description: Agent skill stack for submitting to 《经济学(季刊)》 (China Economic Quarterly, CEQ) — the Peking University / CCER (now NSD) journal closest to international top-field economics standards in China (founded 2001; six issues per year since 2021; ISSN 2095-1086; CN 11-6010/F). Strictest among Chinese economics journals on identification and econometric rigor. Covers fit positioning, internationally-legible topic selection, field-benchmarked literature contribution, structural / quasi-experimental identification, modern staggered-DID compliance (Callaway–Sant'Anna, de Chaisemartin–D'Haultfœuille, Sun–Abraham), inference (clustering, weak-IV-robust, multiple testing), mechanism evidence, figures-over-tables, high-quality English abstract, submission preflight (in-text author-date citations, JEL codes, anonymity, reproducibility), and R&R rebuttals.
